input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.8.1
            TITLE: a head restraint must be provided to limit the rearward motion of the driver’s head.

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.8.1: A Head Restraint must be provided to limit the rearward motion of the driver’s head.
T.2.8.1 A Head Restraint must be provided to limit the rearward motion of the driver’s head.

final_answer: A Head Restraint must be provided to limit the rearward motion of the driver’s head.
